summary: Project named Studiora. User has provided a custom image to use as the Studiora logo.

existing_features.title: Save the uploaded image (open book with green sprout and blue/purple circular background) as the Studiora logo asset at `frontend/public/assets/generated/studiora-logo.png` and use it as the logo displayed in the app header (Layout.tsx) and on the login/landing page (LoginPage.tsx), replacing any previously generated or SVG-based logo.
